name: dotjez
description: The dotjez skill set — cross-cutting how-to-work-with-an-agent skills.

plugins.name: dotjez
plugins.description: Ten cross-cutting agent skills: planning (imagine, challenge, plan-and-build, brains-trust), don't-trust-memory (verify-current, truth-seeking), verify-visually, and working-with-agents (agent-delegation, run-a-role-agent, run-a-self-refining-loop).
